title: Closed Test Stability Update
summary: Improved emergency tracking stability, location permission clarity, provider detail polish, and rating follow-up interactions for closed testing.

changes.message: Improved emergency tracking continuity across payment approval, realtime updates, hydration, and dispatch contact handoff.
Refined rating prompts so testers can give clearer feedback after completed emergency and visit flows.
Clarified location and provider detail states for closed-test hospital discovery scenarios.
Polished staging reliability notes for the next Google Play production access review window.
